title: The Day I Knew You Were the One
excerpt: It wasn't a grand moment. It was quiet, ordinary — and that's exactly why it meant everything.

title: What Marriage Taught Me in Year One
excerpt: Nobody tells you about the little negotiations, the compromises, and how beautiful they actually are.

title: Learning to Be Present Together
excerpt: We put our phones down for a whole weekend. Here's what happened when we just looked at each other.

title: Small Moments That Make a Big Life
excerpt: Morning coffee, evening walks, stolen glances. The small things are actually the whole thing.
